description: On the Remorath ship, May finds Robin and comforts her, learning her mother Polly was taken away. Mack and May strategize; May stays with Robin while Mack goes deeper into the ship to rescue Polly, highlighting their split-second choices and the urgency of the falling city.

transcript.line: Robin? It's okay, it's okay, Robin. You're okay. Mum, they took her away from me. They took her away.
The hull of the ship is busted. She must have climbed out. Your mother, Polly, is she in there?
Check the detention level. Bottom deck.
All right, you stay with her.
